title: Secure Decentralised Frontends
summary: Build the patterns that let Logos applications ship censorship-resistant, tamper-evident frontends to end users.
description: Centralised hosting is the soft underbelly of every "decentralised" app. We are looking for builders to design and document a reference frontend distribution flow that pairs IPFS / Codex storage with deterministic build attestation, signed releases, and graceful client-side fallback so end users always reach an unmodified UI. Deliverables include a reusable distribution toolkit, an integration guide for Logos App developers, and a security review of at least one existing project applying the pattern.
